<p>
  Documentation version: <Badge text="v2.8" variant="tip" /> — the v2.8 baseline including cloud
  management, self-host relay, and enterprise deployment.
</p>

## What is inside

- A getting started flow with copy-pasteable setup, connection, presence, and transport examples.
- Generated API reference pages for the public `@roomful/*` packages.
- Cloud management API docs for projects, rooms, quotas, and usage metering.
- Self-host deployment guide with Docker Compose and PostgreSQL.
- A playground you can run locally against `broadcast`, `webrtc`, or `websocket`.
- Community, contribution, and project process links in one place.

<HeroCards />
